summary: Implementation matches spec: __future__ module exports all 8 CO_* constants and 6 feature flags as integers matching CPython 3.12. 10 unit tests pass. No regressions.

soft.code_quality: Good — follows existing errno_mod pattern, clear naming, proper documentation
soft.error_handling: N/A — constants-only module, no runtime error paths
soft.performance: Negligible — one-time registration of 14 integer constants
soft.documentation: Module doc comment and inline comments are sufficient

comments: Implementation matches spec Changes section exactly. All 8 CO_* constants and 6 feature flag names exported with correct CPython 3.12 values. Module registered as '__future__'. 10 unit tests cover value correctness and roundtripping. No regressions (pre-existing SIGABRT in test suite confirmed on clean main branch).
